description: Style NoteEvery girl needs a choice of kurtas in her off-duty wardrobe. vishudh considers the street fads that are trending currently and adds it to their latest collection of kurtas. This stylish piece remains ethnic in its cut and silhouette but references contemporary design details to create unique fusion wear. For the conservative at heart, this piece can be worn with leggings and delicate sandals.Product DetailsMaroon and beige coloured round neck kurta, has curved pintucks at the yoke, has three quarter sleeves and a vented hemMaterial and Care100% cotton Wash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry inside out in shadeWarm ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
